original_image_tags: A rectangular stamp with a thick border. Inside, the text reads "Released in Full".

elements.description: Two rectangular stamps at the bottom of the page. The left stamp contains the text 'Released in Full' inside a double-lined box. The right stamp contains the text 'Page 4 of 5' inside a single-lined box.

judge.reason: The descriptions disagree on both the number of stamps (one vs. two) and the specific text contained within the described stamp(s), with side B providing detailed but uncorroborated text.
